title: Custom validator that respects changeset.valid?
prompt: Write a custom validator `validate_start_year_before_end_year/1` for a DateRange changeset. The function must guard on changeset.valid? and on get_field returning nil to avoid crashing when preceding validations have already failed. Use validate_change is NOT appropriate here because the validation is cross-field; write a plain function that takes a changeset and returns a changeset. Apply to MyApp.Reports.DateRange fields :start_year, :end_year. Write to lib/my_app/reports/date_range.ex.
tier_rationale: Requires recognizing that custom validators don't automatically bail on invalid input. Sonnet often crashes on nil.
research_citation: dev.to — How To Write A Custom Elixir Schema Validation.
